item.title: Tesla's favorite object
item.description: A small detail changes the force at play in this physics experiment, revealing why the effect works the way it does.

media:content.media:title: Tesla's favorite object
media:content.media:description: A small detail changes the force at play in this physics experiment, revealing why the effect works the way it does.

item.title: Negative mass
item.description: In this video I show you a real experiment that shows how something with a negative mass reacts to a force applied to it. Then I talk about negative mass and if it really is a physical impossibility. If it is real, then how would it react to regular mass?

media:content.media:title: Negative mass
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a real experiment that shows how something with a negative mass reacts to a force applied to it. Then I talk about negative mass and if it really is a physical impossibility. If it is real, then how would it react to regular mass?

item.title: Waves that pull you in
item.description: I show you how tractor beam waves are made

media:content.media:title: Waves that pull you in
media:content.media:description: I show you how tractor beam waves are made

item.title: They put a secret ingredient in water
item.description: A simple experiment shows how a secret ingredient changes water’s behavior

media:content.media:title: They put a secret ingredient in water
media:content.media:description: A simple experiment shows how a secret ingredient changes water’s behavior

item.title: The trick is hiding in plain sight
item.description: Why do these spy glasses reveal that? A simple light change makes the effect visible in this science experiment.

media:content.media:title: The trick is hiding in plain sight
media:content.media:description: Why do these spy glasses reveal that? A simple light change makes the effect visible in this science experiment.

item.title: Can diamonds be broken?
item.description: In this video I test if it is possible to break a real diamond with a hammer, pliers, and hitting it with a rock. Then I talk about the difference between hardness and toughness of a material.

media:content.media:title: Can diamonds be broken?
media:content.media:description: In this video I test if it is possible to break a real diamond with a hammer, pliers, and hitting it with a rock. Then I talk about the difference between hardness and toughness of a material.

item.title: Metal heart beating
item.description: In this video I show you how to make a gallium beating heart. I show you the reaction that happens when you add gallium to sulfuric acid and then touch iron to the beaded up gallium. It causes a pulsing action due to the surface of the gallium reacting with the sulfuric acid and then reversing once it touches the iron.

media:content.media:title: Metal heart beating
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to make a gallium beating heart. I show you the reaction that happens when you add gallium to sulfuric acid and then touch iron to the beaded up gallium. It causes a pulsing action due to the surface of the gallium reacting with the sulfuric acid and then reversing once it touches the iron.

item.title: Creating black plasma
item.description: In this video I take the black fire experiment to the next level to create black plasma.

media:content.media:title: Creating black plasma
media:content.media:description: In this video I take the black fire experiment to the next level to create black plasma.

item.title: Classic fluid dynamics riddle tested on a scale
item.description: Only geniuses can solve this buoyancy riddle

media:content.media:description: Only geniuses can solve this buoyancy riddle

item.title: Does a drone change weight in a sealed box?
item.description: A sealed box, a drone, and a scale: does the reading change when the drone flies inside? A simple physics question with a clear demonstration.

media:content.media:title: Does a drone change weight in a sealed box?
media:content.media:description: A sealed box, a drone, and a scale: does the reading change when the drone flies inside? A simple physics question with a clear demonstration.

item.title: This ball turns into gold?
item.description: A simple setup leads to a strangely satisfying reveal in this science experiment.

media:content.media:title: This ball turns into gold?
media:content.media:description: A simple setup leads to a strangely satisfying reveal in this science experiment.
